plugins.name: easyds
plugins.description: Drive the full Easy-Dataset fine-tuning pipeline from Claude Code: upload → chunk → generate questions → generate answers → export Alpaca/ShareGPT, plus the unique dataset-eval feedback loop. Bundles the agent skill and a /easyds-setup installer.
